top_signals.title: US strikes Iranian missile, drone, radar sites
top_signals.summary: The U.S. struck Iranian missile, drone and radar sites on Friday, U.S. Central Command said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: China's Zhipu is closing in on top U.S. AI models with Anthropic and OpenAI held back
top_signals.summary: Zhipu's GLM 5.2 shows the AI fight is shifting to who delivers the most intelligence per dollar, making open source suddenly a real contender.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Red Lobster's Ultimate Endless Shrimp promotion described as a 'car crash' for the company, lawsuit says
top_signals.summary: "Thai Union doubled down on a campaign to squeeze out every drop of value that it could," creditors said
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Robot nation: China’s bid to beat its demographic decline - Financial Times
top_signals.summary: Robot nation: China’s bid to beat its demographic decline  Financial Times
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: DraftKings launches its own prediction markets exchange as consumer volume exceeds $3 billion
top_signals.summary: The company said its prediction markets vertical has generated approximately $3.4 billion in annualized consumer volume.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
